landing.tagline: Plan football nights with your friends — without endless group chats.
landing.feature1Desc: Choose the fixtures your group actually wants to watch.
landing.feature2Desc: Know which friends are joining before kick-off.
landing.feature3Desc: Turn match decisions into shared plans.
landing.cta: Coordinate matches, groups, and watch parties.

learnMore.title: How MatchNights works
learnMore.builtForFriendsDesc: MatchNights is invite-only by design. Each group has its own shared space to pick matches, compare preferences, and plan football nights together.
learnMore.step1Desc: Choose the fixtures you care about before kick-off.
learnMore.step2Desc: Check which friends want to watch the same match.
learnMore.step3Desc: Turn match preferences into shared plans.
learnMore.whyNotChat: Why not just use a group chat?
learnMore.whyNotChatDesc: Group chats are great for conversation. They are not great for coordination. MatchNights gives every group a clear place to see match preferences without scrolling through old messages.
learnMore.insightsDesc: The prediction insights shown in MatchNights are based on publicly available market data and probability calculations. Instead of displaying complex numbers, we convert those estimates into simple win, draw, and away-win probabilities that are easier to understand and discuss with friends. They're not guarantees and they're not betting advice — they're simply a helpful way to spark conversation and compare opinions before kickoff.
learnMore.supportInviteDesc: No public sign-ups. Groups are managed through invitations.
learnMore.supportGroupDesc: See what your friends want to watch in each group.
learnMore.supportPlanningDesc: Keep football nights organized around real fixtures.
learnMore.supportCalendarDesc: Designed to make upcoming matches easier to follow.
learnMore.supportAdminDesc: Group access and invitations stay controlled.
learnMore.supportWCDesc: Built with football tournaments and shared viewing in mind.
learnMore.noPrizesDesc: MatchNights does not offer prizes, payouts, or rewards for predictions.
learnMore.friendlyCompDesc: Compete with friends, compare opinions, and enjoy match nights together.
learnMore.yourRulesDesc: If your group wants to celebrate the winner, that's entirely up to you and outside the platform.
learnMore.readyCta: Ready for the next match night?
learnMore.readyDesc: Start with your group, pick the matches, and make every night count.
